title: wasm: NieClient::connect() does not transfer event callback to new client — silent callback loss on reconnect
description: wasm/src/api.rs NieClient::connect() closes the existing WasmTransport (line 162) then creates a fresh NieRelayClient (line 165). The existing client's JS event callback (registered via on_event()) is stored on the old WasmTransport.notify_cb. After connect() completes, inner holds the new client, which has no notify_cb. Any events received after the second connect() call are silently discarded until on_event() is called again. This is not documented anywhere in the API. Impact: any JS caller that reconnects (calls connect() a second time without re-calling on_event()) will silently receive no events — messages, user_joined, directory_updated, etc. are all dropped with no error. The correct fix is to copy the old callback to the new client or document that on_event() must be re-called after every connect().
close_reason: callback preserved/transplanted when inner client is replaced on reconnect
